page: Microsoft Azure NC40ads_H100_v5 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine from the NCadsH100v5 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 9V84 processor. It features 40 dedicated physical cores running at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 320.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB per core, and a bundled 3971 GB local storage drive. Acceleration is driven by a single NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU equipped with 94 GB of VRAM.

Benchmark evaluations place this server in the top tier for single-core CPU performance, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and Geekbench multi-core execution. Memory performance is highly competitive, with the PassMark memory score ranking in the top 10% and cached small-block read bandwidth reaching the top 25%. For artificial intelligence workloads, the server achieves 33.22 tokens per second for text generation on a medium 7B LLM model, and 3.88 tokens per second on a large 70B model.

Given the integration of a high-end NVIDIA Hopper GPU and substantial local storage, this server offers high resource density for specialized workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for organizations requiring dedicated, high-throughput compute without the overhead of multi-GPU clusters. This configuration is highly suited for large language model inference, deep learning training, high-performance database operations, and intensive scientific simulations.
description: Microsoft Azure NC40ads_H100_v5 is a high-performance, GPU-accelerated virtual machine designed for demanding compute and AI workloads. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9V84 processor with 40 dedicated physical cores running at 3.7 GHz, it features 320.0 GB of system memory and 3971 GB of local storage. The server is equipped with a single NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU featuring 94 GB of VRAM. Benchmark results indicate top-tier performance in single-core CPU tasks, multi-threaded decompression, and memory operations, alongside strong capabilities in large language model text generation. This hardware profile makes the NC40ads_H100_v5 highly suitable for machine learning inference, data science, and database operations requiring high-speed local storage and dedicated GPU acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NC40ads_H100_v5 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 40 AMD EPYC cores, 320 GB RAM, a 3971 GB local disk, and an NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU with 94 GB VRAM for AI and database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NC40ads_H100_v5 features 40 AMD EPYC cores, 320 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU with 94 GB VRAM for high-performance AI workloads.
tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC server featuring an NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU and high-capacity local storage for advanced machine learning workloads.

40 dedicated AMD EPYC 9V84 cores running at 3.7 GHz
320 GB of system memory and 3971 GB of local storage
Top-tier performance in single-core CPU and multi-threaded decompression benchmarks
